الأسئلة الشائعة

إجابات واضحة لأسئلتكم.

QWho should get STD screening?

Recommended for sexually active individuals, those with new or multiple partners, or those with symptoms.

QIs fasting required?

No. A urine sample and/or swab only. No fasting — attend at any time of day.

QHow long until results?

Results within 3 working days, delivered securely.

QIs my information private?

Yes. Strict confidentiality*. Delivered in line with approved reporting requirements.

QPackage-7 vs Package-12?

Package-12 adds Gardnerella, Candida, Syphilis, HSV-1 and HSV-2 to all 7 tests.

QIs home collection available?

Yes — across Abu Dhabi. Call 02 633 3923 or WhatsApp +971 50 805 6623.

احجز اليوم

أجرِ الفحص. احصل على الإجابة. واطمئن.

No referral required. Walk-ins welcome. Home collection available.
